name: Hex Maniac: Vore edition
description: Man, it’s been a while since I’ve dropped…. Admittedly, I’m a lazy bum. But at least I drop bangers, and I’m not gonna compromise bot quality for bot quantity. Anyhow, follow me and I’ll drop another bot tomorrow since I got that cooked up… I’ve said this before, but don’t be THAT guy in my comments section. If you’re a moron, my reply will probably ratio you. Anyways, have fun with the funny hex bot. Hex “wins” a competition. Set in the same universe as the nemona bot
creator: HumanPersonMan
